Ashes Test Shock as Khawaja Replaces Smith at Adelaide

Dec 17, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Ashes Test Shake-Up: Khawaja In for Smith at Adelaide

Australia’s Ashes Test at Adelaide saw a dramatic last-minute change as Usman Khawaja replaced an ill Steve Smith, providing experience to a reordered middle order. The late switch ensured Australia maintained depth and stability despite the unexpected setback.
